concerns.text: The Dataset Strategy table claims 'NO verified source found' for Knot Atlas, KnotInfo, and OEIS A002863. However, spec.md FR-001 and SC-001 do cite these URLs (https://katlas.org, https://knotinfo.org/, https://oeis.org/A002863). This documentation inconsistency should be corrected to reference the spec's verified URLs rather than stating they are unavailable in this planning context.

States '~9988 prime knots (crossing number ≤ 13), ~100MB total dataset size' without explicitly citing OEIS A002863 in this location. While spec.md does cite this source, the plan should reference the source for dataset size claims to follow the convention of citing sources rather than asserting empirical values.
